prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild tavern corner, Ren Starling (masculine healer in cream and mint robes) and Ren Mistfell (feminine crafter in apron and tool belt) kneeling on the floor. Ren Starling gently extends a hand with soft, warm magical light toward a disoriented, glowing mana hound hiding under a wooden tavern table. Ren Mistfell assists by holding a steady, low-light lure, calm atmosphere, anime RPG aesthetic, cinematic camera, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild tavern shot; Ren Mistfell slides a small, humming brass soothing device across the floor toward the mana hound, while Ren Starling maintains his calming posture. The mana hound, previously skittish, begins to lower its head and relax as the two guild members coordinate their efforts, consistent lighting and character positions, no text, no watermark.
